rationale.D1: Subsystems (Arm, Claw, Climber, SwerveDrive) own CTRE hardware objects directly as members (TalonFX, CANcoder) with no IO interface abstraction; the CowLib provides utilities but no swappable hardware seam.
rationale.D2: Per-subsystem state enums are real and used (Arm::State with 20 states, Climber::ClimbState, AlgaeIntake::HingeState), and OperatorController coordinates arm+claw together via a SuperstructureMode toggle; SwerveDrive uses std::variant for drive states — solid FSM-per-subsystem pattern but no single centralized coordinator.
rationale.D3: IsSimulation() branches exist throughout (SimulatorControlBoard, sim encoder offsets, DriverStationSim in AutoModes), but no WPILib mechanism physics classes (ElevatorSim, DCMotorSim) are used — token sim branching only.
rationale.D4: src/test/cpp/main.cpp is the GradleRIO boilerplate (HAL_Initialize + RUN_ALL_TESTS()) with zero test cases; discounted as empty harness.
rationale.D5: Every subsystem publishes structured telemetry via typed nt:: publishers (nt::DoublePublisher, nt::StructPublisher, nt::StructArrayPublisher) under /1538/ prefix, and multiple AdvantageScope JSON layouts are committed; no AdvantageKit/DogLog.
rationale.D6: 44 Choreo .traj files are actively loaded via TrajectoryCache (choreo::Choreo::LoadTrajectory) and driven by the DrivePath command which samples SwerveTrajectory in AutoModes; Choreo is the sole path tool, no PathPlanner.
rationale.D7: Localizer.cpp uses PhotonCamera with MULTI_TAG_PNP_ON_COPROCESSOR, feeds AddVisionMeasurement with area-based std-dev tuning and ambiguity rejection; GetClosestReefTag() computes game-piece scoring poses from the pose estimate — fused filtered estimation confirmed.
rationale.D8: Four seasons tracked, a real README with calibration/build steps, CowLib utility library in-tree; no CI workflows and no separate versioned library repo — solid hygiene and onboarding docs but below CI+library threshold.
